---
title: "Templates"
---

# Templates

We've organized the document formats repeatedly needed across VDLC's six stages into five kinds. These aren't blank forms but practical templates that include writing guidance and example sentence fragments, so copy them straight from each page and fill them in.

| Template | When to use | Related guide stage |
|---|---|---|
| [Intent Document](/templates/intent-doc) | When agreeing on what to build and why in condensed 6-pager form and leaving it as a document | [Stage 1 — Intent](/guide/intent) |
| [PR-FAQ](/templates/pr-faq) | When picturing the finished shape first as a launch announcement and expected FAQ | [Stage 1 — Intent](/guide/intent) |
| [Risk Matrix](/templates/risk-matrix) | When assigning a risk grade to an artifact and setting verification intensity | [Stage 4 — Verification](/guide/verify) |
| [Review Checklist](/templates/review-checklist) | When a person or a cross-review agent reviews agent output | [Stage 4 — Verification](/guide/verify) |
| [CLAUDE.md Example](/templates/claude-md) | When setting up the skeleton of a project rules file or inspecting and refreshing an existing one | [Stage 2 — Context](/guide/context) |
